jokes:
😂 Teacher: Tum school kyu nahi aaye?
Student: Sir, sapne mein lottery lagi thi, paisa count kar raha tha!
Teacher: Toh aaj kyu aaye?
Student: Paisa khatam ho gaya! 😅

😂 Pappu: Papa, mujhe dar lagta hai!
Papa: Kisse?
Pappu: Andhere se!
Papa: Beta, jab main tumhari umar ka tha, mujhe koi dar nahi tha.
Pappu: Haan papa, tab toh daadi hoti thi na ghar mein! 😜

😂 Wife: Suno ji, agar main mar gayi toh kya karoge?
Husband: Main bhi pagal ho jaunga.
Wife: Phir?
Husband: Pagal ko kaun marta hai! 🤪

😂 Ek aadmi ne doctor se kaha: Doctor sahab, sab mujhe ignore karte hain.
Doctor: Next! 😅

😂 Santa: Banta, teri wife kaise hai?
Banta: Dusron ke mukable mein bahut acchi hai!
Santa: Haan yeh toh hai! 😂

😂 Beta: Mummy, mujhe school nahi jaana!
Mummy: Kyu?
Beta: Bachche mujhe pareshan karte hain.
Mummy: Beta, tum principal ho, tumhe jaana padega! 🤣

😂 Judge: Tumne chori kyu ki?
Chor: Judge sahab, dukaan par likha tha - 'Yahan sab kuch milta hai' toh main mil gaya! 😜

😂 Ek ladka ladki ko: I love you!
Ladki: Main tumhare layak nahi hoon.
Ladka: Arey woh toh mujhe bhi pata hai, par kya karein dil hai ki maanta nahi! 💔😂
motivational_quotes:
🌟 "Sapne woh nahi jo neend mein aayein, sapne woh hain jo neend na aane dein." — APJ Abdul Kalam
💪 Aaj ka din tera hai, make it count!

🌟 "Koshish karne walon ki haar nahi hoti." — Harivansh Rai Bachchan
💪 Haar ke baad hi asli jeet aati hai!

🌟 "Zindagi mein kuch bada karna hai toh chhoti cheezon ko enjoy karna seekho."
💪 Small steps, big journey!

🌟 "Success ka koi shortcut nahi hota, par consistency zaroor hoti hai."
💪 Keep going, results aayenge!

🌟 "Mushkilein tujhe har pal yeh bata rahi hain, ki tu aage badh raha hai."
💪 Every challenge = growth!

🌟 "Mann ke haare haar hai, mann ke jeete jeet." — Hindi Proverb
💪 Mindset hi sab kuch hai!

🌟 "Waqt badalta hai, waqt badalta hai... bas himmat mat haarna."
💪 Patience + effort = success!

🌟 "Jo log kehte hain ki yeh nahi ho sakta, unhe un logon ko dekhna chahiye jo kar rahe hain."
💪 Prove them wrong!

festivals.name: Eid-ul-Fitr
festivals.description: Eid Mubarak! Ramzan ke baad khushi 🌙

health_tips_general: 📱 Screen time kam karo, specially raat ko
🧘 5 min meditation ya pranayam karo daily

greetings.morning: 🌅 Suprabhat! Aaj ka din shubh ho!
